select.xpath: bf:Instance/bf:note/bf:Note[rdfs:*[. != ''] or rdf:value[. != ''] or bf:*]|bf:Work/bf:note/bf:Note[rdfs:*[. != ''] or rdf:value[. != ''] or bf:*]|//bf:Item/bf:note/bf:Note[rdfs:*[. != ''] or rdf:value[. != ''] or bf:*]

case.test: local-name(../..)='Instance' and ( translate(bf:noteType,$upper,$lower)='type of computer data' or rdf:type/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/mnotetype/computer')
local-name(../..)='Instance' and (translate(bf:noteType,$upper,$lower)='type of computer data' or rdf:type/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/mnotetype/computer')

local-name(../..)='Instance' and (translate(bf:noteType,$upper,$lower)='biographical data' or translate(bf:noteType,$upper,$lower)='administrative history' or rdf:type/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/mnotetype/biogdata' or rdf:type/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/mnotetype/adminhist')

local-name(../..)='Instance' and (translate(bf:noteType,$upper,$lower)='index' or translate(bf:noteType,$upper,$lower)='finding aid' or rdf:type/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/mnotetype/index' or rdf:type/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/mnotetype/finding')
starts-with(.,'Source of description:') or starts-with(rdfs:label,'Description based on:')
starts-with(.,'Source of description:') or starts-with(rdfs:label,'Description based on:')

(local-name(../..)='Work' and ( translate(bf:noteType,$upper,$lower)='language' or rdf:type/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/mnotetype/lang' or rdf:type/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/mnotetype/award' or rdf:type/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/mnotetype/credits' or rdf:type/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/mnotetype/participants' or rdf:type/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/mnotetype/doc' or rdf:type/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/mnotetype/citeas' or rdf:type/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/mnotetype/suppl' ))

(local-name(../..)='Instance' or local-name(../..)='Item') and ( (translate(bf:noteType,$upper,$lower)='physical details' or translate(bf:noteType,$upper,$lower)='accompanying material' or translate(bf:noteType,$upper,$lower)='binding' or translate(bf:noteType,$upper,$lower)='action') or (rdf:type/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/mnotetype/physical' or rdf:type/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/mnotetype/accmat' or rdf:type/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/mnotetype/binding' or rdf:type/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/mnotetype/action') )

xsl:value-of.select: 39 + count(ancestor::bf:Work/bf:note/bf:Note[rdfs:label[@xml:lang and not(contains(translate(rdfs:label/@xml:lang,$upper,$lower),translate($pCatScript,$upper,$lower)))]]) + count(ancestor::bf:Work/bf:tableOfContents/bf:TableOfContents[rdfs:label[@xml:lang and not(contains(translate(rdfs:label/@xml:lang,$upper,$lower),translate($pCatScript,$upper,$lower)))]]) + count(ancestor::bf:Work/bf:supplementaryContent/bf:SupplementaryContent[rdfs:label[. != '' and @xml:lang and not(contains(translate(rdfs:label/@xml:lang,$upper,$lower),translate($pCatScript,$upper,$lower)))] and not(@rdf:about)]) + count(ancestor::bf:Work/bf:dissertation/bf:Dissertation) + position()

39 + count(ancestor::bf:Work/bf:note/bf:Note[rdfs:label[@xml:lang and not(contains(translate(rdfs:label/@xml:lang,$upper,$lower),translate($pCatScript,$upper,$lower)))]]) + count(ancestor::bf:Work/bf:tableOfContents/bf:TableOfContents[rdfs:label[@xml:lang and not(contains(translate(rdfs:label/@xml:lang,$upper,$lower),translate($pCatScript,$upper,$lower)))]]) + count(ancestor::bf:Work/bf:supplementaryContent/bf:SupplementaryContent[rdfs:label[. != '' and @xml:lang and not(contains(translate(rdfs:label/@xml:lang,$upper,$lower),translate($pCatScript,$upper,$lower)))] and not(@rdf:about)]) + position()

49 + count(ancestor::bf:Instance/bf:note/bf:Note[rdfs:label[@xml:lang and not(contains(translate(rdfs:label/@xml:lang,$upper,$lower),translate($pCatScript,$upper,$lower)))]]) + count(ancestor::bf:Instance/bf:supplementaryContent/bf:SupplementaryContent[rdfs:label[. != '' and @xml:lang and not(contains(translate(rdfs:label/@xml:lang,$upper,$lower),translate($pCatScript,$upper,$lower)))] and not(@rdf:about)]) + position()

49 + count(ancestor::bf:Instance/bf:note/bf:Note[rdfs:label[@xml:lang and not(contains(translate(rdfs:label/@xml:lang,$upper,$lower),translate($pCatScript,$upper,$lower)))]]) + count(ancestor::bf:Instance/bf:supplementaryContent/bf:SupplementaryContent[rdfs:label[. != '' and @xml:lang and not(contains(translate(rdfs:label/@xml:lang,$upper,$lower),translate($pCatScript,$upper,$lower)))] and not(@rdf:about)]) + position() + 1

context.xpath: bf:Work/bf:geographicCoverage/*[ not( bf:source/@rdf:resource='http://id.loc.gov/authorities/classification/G' or bf:source/bf:Source/@rdf:about='http://id.loc.gov/authorities/classification/G' ) and not(@rdf:about) and rdfs:label]

xsl:value-of.select: 41 + count(ancestor::bf:Work/bf:note/bf:Note[rdfs:label[@xml:lang and not(contains(translate(rdfs:label/@xml:lang,$upper,$lower),translate($pCatScript,$upper,$lower)))]]) + count(ancestor::bf:Work/bf:tableOfContents/bf:TableOfContents[rdfs:label[@xml:lang and not(contains(translate(rdfs:label/@xml:lang,$upper,$lower),translate($pCatScript,$upper,$lower)))]]) + count(ancestor::bf:Work/bf:supplementaryContent/bf:SupplementaryContent[rdfs:label[. != '' and @xml:lang and not(contains(translate(rdfs:label/@xml:lang,$upper,$lower),translate($pCatScript,$upper,$lower)))] and not(@rdf:about)]) + count(ancestor::bf:Work/bf:dissertation/bf:Dissertation) + position()
